# AI Landscape

An AWS-biased reference for AI builders to navigate the ecosystem, evaluate trade-offs, and make informed architectural decisions.

## What this is

Two complementary tools in one repo:

**Interactive React app** — a drill-down map of the AI builder landscape. Click a category to explore its tools. Click a leaf node to open that tool's documentation. AWS-native services are highlighted.

**Python diagram** — a static architecture diagram (`Final/`) generated by the `diagrams` library, showing the full ecosystem as a graphviz PNG.

## React app

```bash
cd web
npm install
npm run dev
```

Open `http://localhost:5173`.

**Navigation:** Click any top-level category to drill in. Click a tool card to open its docs. Use the breadcrumb to navigate back.

**Categories:** Application Platform · Agent Orchestration · Foundation Models · Model Infrastructure · Tool & Protocol · Memory & Knowledge · Data Sources · LLMOps & Quality · Security & Governance

## Python diagram

Requires Python 3.12+ and [uv](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/).

```bash
uv run python AI-Landscape.py
```

Output: `Final/ai_landscape_YYYYMMDD.png`

To refresh icons:

```bash
uv run python download_icons.py
```

Requires `rsvg-convert` (`brew install librsvg`) for SVG→PNG conversion.

## Structure

```
AI-Landscape/
├── AI-Landscape.py       # Diagram generator
├── download_icons.py     # Icon acquisition script
├── images/               # 49 brand icons (PNG)
├── Final/                # Generated diagrams
└── web/                  # React app
    ├── src/
    │   ├── data/landscape.ts   # Full ecosystem tree
    │   ├── components/
    │   ├── hooks/
    │   ├── theme/
    │   └── types/
    └── public/images/    # Symlink → ../../images
```

## Tech stack

- React 18 + TypeScript + Vite
- MUI v5 (AWS orange `#FF9900` palette)
- `diagrams` library (graphviz backend)
- Icons: Simple Icons CDN + Pillow fallbacks
